About Back to Wellness Chiropractic

Over 24 years of clinical experience, personalized care, and advanced drug-free therapies in Kirkwood, MO.

Our Story

Committed to Your Healing Journey

At Back to Wellness Chiropractic, we help people across Kirkwood and the greater St. Louis area find relief from back pain, neck tension, headaches, sciatica, and more — with chiropractic care tailored to your body and lifestyle.

Our experienced team focuses on gentle, non-invasive treatment that supports real, lasting results. To support deeper recovery, we offer SoftWave and Red Light Therapy — two drug-free options known for reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and accelerating the body's natural healing process.

Established in 2014 and built on over 24 years of clinical experience, our practice is designed to be warm, welcoming, and fully equipped for comprehensive chiropractic care. From your first consultation to your latest adjustment, we're here to help you feel at ease from day one.

What Drives Us

Our Core Values

Personalized Care

We consider the whole person — your symptoms, lifestyle, and goals — to craft a tailored wellness plan that addresses your unique needs, not a one-size-fits-all approach.

Non-Invasive Treatment

Drug-free, surgery-free therapies that support your body's natural healing process. From adjustments to SoftWave and Red Light, every treatment is gentle and evidence-based.

Accessible & Responsive

Same-day appointments, affordable $49 initial treatments, and a welcoming office in Kirkwood. We make it easy to start your journey to better health without financial stress.
